main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.03|1.03]] |gameversion=1.03 |date=December 1, 2023 |summary=Costume 3 release. Minor bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/en/battle_change/20231201 Patch Notes] }} == Costume 3 Patch == * Costume 3 released for the original 18 characters
== '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Wakeup Input Buffer''' ** Increased 4f → 7f ** Fixed an issue related to buffered inputs that occur immediately after the screen freeze of the opponent's {{clr|SA|Super Art}} * '''Perfect Parry''' ** Fixed issue where certain actions would shorten the invincibility window on a successful Perfect Parry * '''Assist Combos (Modern)''' ** Fixed issue that caused the start of the input buffer to occur 1 frame later than intended ** Also fixes issue where Chun-Li and Kimberly could not perform a jump cancel during Assist Combos if a button was input on the same frame * '''Taunts''' ** Can no longer kara-cancel a special move into a taunt (e.g. PPP~KKK on consecutive frames)
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** No longer hits low on active frames 2-5 * {{clr|H|Chi Wen}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Fixed issue where recovery was 1 frame longer on Perfect Parry * {{clr|L|LP Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|L|236LP}}) ** Fixed issue where recovery was 6 frames longer on Perfect Parry * {{clr|OD|OD Cruel Fate}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) ** Fixed issue where command inputs would swap directions immediately after jumping over the opponent * Modern Controls: ** {{clr|M|MP Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|M|236M}}): Fixed issue where inputting Down after a successful command input would prevent the move from coming out ** {{clr|M|MK Snake Step}} ({{clr|DR|5S}}): Fixed issue where this move would be performed with more shortcut commands besides {{clr|DR|5S}} ** {{clr|OD|OD Snake Step}} (A[{{clr|DR|5S}}]): After regular/{{clr|OD|OD}} Nightshade Pulse, the dash no longer comes out while holding any Back/Down/Forward direction *** Allows A.K.I. to input Modern shortcut moves during the projectile recovery without buffering an accidental {{clr|OD|OD Snake Step}}
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Fixed issue where recovery was 5 frames longer on Parry / Perfect Parry / Armor absorb * {{clr|M|Rock Crusher}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) ** When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block adjusted 1250,1250 → 1250,625 ** Only applies when both hits connect; 2nd hit only builds 1250 Drive gauge for opponent on block during Burnout * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active ** On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 ** Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20 * {{clr|SA|SA2 Install}} Bug Fixes ** {{clr|L|5LK}} / {{clr|L|2LP}}: fixed issue where front hurtbox during startup was vulnerable to the opponent's cross-up attacks ** {{clr|M|5MK}} / {{clr|H|5HP}}: fixed issue where the special cancel buffer timing was earlier than usual ** {{clr|M|2MP}}: fixed issue where foot hurtbox was smaller than usual ** {{clr|M|j.MP}}: fixed issue where collision box would not expand on hit ** {{clr|OD|[4]6PP}} / [2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}}: fixed issue where the input buffer for {{clr|SA|Rolling Cannon}} follow-ups did not work ** {{clr|H|[4]6HP}}: fixed issue where bounce-back distance was shorter on Perfect Parry ** {{clr|OD|63214KK}}: fixed issue where the first hit's active frames were 2 frames shorter than usual
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|M|j.MP}} ** Fixed issue where active frames 3-4 of the first hit were not considered an Overhead * {{clr|H|Lotus Fist}} (214P~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block for 2nd hit only adjusted 1250 → 2500 ** No change when both hits are blocked (2500,1250)
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * Speedy Maracas (22PP) ** Fixed issue where plinking the button input (e.g. 22P~P) caused the move to be recognized as a canceled activation even while holding the buttons ** Fixed issue where the move would not end upon button release with under 1 bar of {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge ** Modern Controls: fixed issue where the move could not be performed when plinking the buttons as 22{{clr|M|M}}~{{clr|H|H}} ** Modern Controls: fixed issue where a different button was required to continue the Held version depending on the amount of {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge stocked
=== '''E. Honda''' === * Modern Controls: {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|[4]}}{{clr|H|H}}{{clr|DR|S}}) fixed issue where the charge time was 5 frames longer when using the shortcut
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active ** On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 ** Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20
=== '''Jamie''' === * Tensei Kick (2KK) ** Can no longer be kara-canceled into Taunt on the first startup frame
=== '''JP''' === * Air Throw ({{clr|L|j.LPLK}}) ** Fixed issue where JP would not have a {{FKD}} or {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} property applied when performed after a Departure: Window teleport * {{clr|H|Bylina}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) ** Fixed issue where the attack could not be canceled if the 2nd attack was blocked crouching * Embrace (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Fixed issue where the throw would not hit an opponent facing backwards
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where Drive Gauge recovery was different while the install timer was active ** On Ground, Drive Regen per Frame: 50 → 40 ** Airborne + Burnout, Drive Regen per Frame: 10 → 20
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Fixed issue where the startup was 1 frame faster when the button was released at a specific timing
=== '''Rashid''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** Fixed issue where if you performed an enhanced special move using the final Air Current, you could not use another enhanced special afterwards ** Fixed issue where if you kicked the tornado at its final state with Arabian Cyclone, it would move the same speed as before it was kicked
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|M|Collarbone Breaker}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) ** When the opponent is in Burnout, opponent's Drive Gain on Block for 2nd hit only adjusted 625 → 1250 ** No change when both hits are blocked (1250,625)
